entry.title: Newsroom
entry.summary: The official source for news about Apple, from Apple. Read press releases, get updates, watch video and download images.

entry.title: Apple Services - Newsroom
entry.summary: The source for news about Apple Services. Get updates on the latest Apple Arcade games, Apple Originals on TV+, Podcasts, Books, and more from Apple Newsroom.

entry.title: Apple Stories - Newsroom
entry.summary: Discover more stories from Apple Newsroom that showcase the creators, developers, and innovators leaving the world better than they found it.
